nodes.name: companies (pause_reason, paused_at)
nodes.summary: Adds pause_reason and paused_at columns to the companies table, enabling company-level pause state tracking with reason and timestamp.

nodes.name: budget_incidents (policy_window_threshold_idx)
nodes.summary: Recreates the budget_incidents_policy_window_threshold_idx as a unique partial index on policy_id, window_start, and threshold_type for non-dismissed incidents.

nodes.name: execution_workspaces
nodes.summary: Introduces the execution_workspaces table that tracks AI agent workspaces for code execution, including mode, strategy, repository, branch, lifecycle timestamps, and cleanup state.

nodes.name: issue_work_products
nodes.summary: Introduces the issue_work_products table linking issues to external work outputs (pull requests, deployments) produced by agent execution workspaces, with health and review state tracking.

nodes.name: instance_settings
nodes.summary: Creates the instance_settings singleton table for storing global Paperclip instance configuration, including an experimental features JSONB column.

nodes.name: workspace_operations
nodes.summary: Creates the workspace_operations table logging individual shell commands executed within agent workspaces, capturing command phase, status, exit code, logs, and timing.

nodes.name: heartbeat_runs (process columns)
nodes.summary: Adds process_pid, process_started_at, retry_of_run_id, and process_loss_retry_count columns to heartbeat_runs, enabling process tracking and self-referential retry chains.

nodes.name: routines
nodes.summary: Creates the core routines table for recurring AI agent tasks, defining ownership, assignment, concurrency and catch-up policies, and audit timestamps.

nodes.name: routine_triggers
nodes.summary: Creates the routine_triggers table storing cron schedules, webhook signing keys, and execution state for each trigger that fires a routine.

nodes.name: routine_runs
nodes.summary: Creates the routine_runs table recording each individual execution run of a routine, including trigger source, idempotency key, coalescing, and failure details.

nodes.name: issues (open_routine_execution_uq, routine_triggers_public_id_uq)
nodes.summary: Adds a partial unique index on issues to prevent duplicate open routine-execution issues, and a unique index on routine_triggers.public_id for webhook deduplication.

nodes.name: instance_settings (general column)
nodes.summary: Adds a general JSONB column to instance_settings for storing unstructured instance-level configuration data.

nodes.name: company_skills
nodes.summary: Creates the company_skills table enabling companies to register custom skills (agent capabilities) with source locators, trust levels, and compatibility metadata.

nodes.name: issues (open_routine_execution_uq rebuild)
nodes.summary: Drops and recreates the issues_open_routine_execution_uq partial unique index with an additional condition requiring execution_run_id to be non-null.

nodes.name: board_api_keys
nodes.summary: Creates the board_api_keys table for storing hashed user API keys with expiry and revocation support.

nodes.name: cli_auth_challenges
nodes.summary: Creates the cli_auth_challenges table implementing the CLI authentication flow, capturing approval, cancellation, and expiry state for in-flight auth requests.

nodes.name: issue_inbox_archives
nodes.summary: Creates the issue_inbox_archives table tracking which users have archived specific issues from their inbox view.

nodes.name: document_revisions (title, format columns)
nodes.summary: Adds title and format columns to document_revisions and backfills them from the parent documents table, migrating per-document metadata to per-revision metadata.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses an UPDATE...FROM join to backfill historical rows during migration, a common safe migration pattern.

nodes.name: feedback_votes
nodes.summary: Creates feedback_votes for capturing user votes (thumbs up/down) on agent outputs, including consent and redaction tracking for data sharing with Paperclip Labs.

nodes.name: feedback_exports
nodes.summary: Creates feedback_exports tracking the export pipeline for feedback votes shared with Paperclip Labs, including payload digest, versioning, and retry tracking.

nodes.name: routines (variables column)
nodes.summary: Adds a variables JSONB array column to routines, enabling parameterized routine definitions.

nodes.name: issue_relations
nodes.summary: Creates the issue_relations table for typed relationships between issues (e.g., blocks, duplicates), with a unique constraint preventing duplicate edges.

nodes.name: projects (env column)
nodes.summary: Adds an env JSONB column to projects for storing project-level environment variable configurations.

nodes.name: issues / issue_comments (full-text search indexes)
nodes.summary: Enables the pg_trgm extension and creates GIN trigram indexes on issues title, description, identifier, and issue_comments body for full-text search support.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses pg_trgm GIN indexes for efficient ILIKE/similarity search without full-text search dictionaries.

nodes.name: issue_execution_decisions
nodes.summary: Creates the issue_execution_decisions table recording human or agent approval/rejection decisions at each stage of an issue's execution pipeline.

nodes.name: inbox_dismissals
nodes.summary: Creates the inbox_dismissals table tracking which inbox notification items a user has dismissed, keyed by a string item_key.

nodes.name: routines (nullable project_id, assignee_agent_id)
nodes.summary: Relaxes the routines table by making project_id and assignee_agent_id nullable, supporting draft routines not yet assigned to a project or agent.

nodes.name: heartbeat_runs (process_group_id column)
nodes.summary: Adds a process_group_id integer column to heartbeat_runs for grouping runs by OS process group for lifecycle management.

nodes.name: company_user_sidebar_preferences
nodes.summary: Creates tables for persisting per-user sidebar preferences including project ordering within a company and company ordering globally.

nodes.name: join_requests (deduplication indexes)
nodes.summary: Deduplicates existing join_requests rows and adds unique partial indexes to prevent duplicate pending join requests per user or email within a company.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a CTE with row_number() to identify and delete duplicate rows before creating the unique constraint, a safe deduplication migration pattern.
